title: phlomoides glanduligera
intro: Phlomoides glanduligera, also known as Lycopsis glanduligera, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support respiratory health. Phlomoides glanduligera can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
